hero.tagline: Interactive cycling adventures on Twitch — authenticity, community, and ambitious challenges.

teaser.title: And this is just the beginning
teaser.subtitle: After France, Denmark and Malta, a new destination is on the horizon. SubaBike returns in 2026 to push the boundaries of community adventure even further.

adventures.title: Adventures
adventures.subtitle: Three cycling journeys streamed live on Twitch. From the first national epic to the international SubaBike format, each adventure pushes the boundaries of community-driven live content.
adventures.relatedClipsComing: Clips from this adventure will be available soon.
adventures.comingSoonTeaser: Details about this adventure will be revealed soon. Stay tuned!
adventures.comingSoonCta: Follow the Twitch channel to catch the announcement.

2022.title: Sochaux → Nice
2022.subtitle: The first crossing of France by bike
2022.description: First major cycling adventure live on Twitch. 11 days from Sochaux to the Mediterranean, laying the foundation for a series of community journeys.

2023.title: Sochaux → Denmark
2023.subtitle: First self-sufficient European crossing
2023.description: A 13-day expedition to Denmark that proved the viability of long-distance, fully self-sufficient adventures streamed live.

2024.title: Sochaux → Malta
2024.subtitle: The first SubaBike — subs add kilometers
2024.description: The SubaBike format was born: each subscription adds kilometers instead of time. 34 days of international adventure where the community decides the route in real time.

clips.title: Clips
clips.subtitle: The channel's best moments, captured by the community.

live.title: Live
live.subtitle: Join the live stream on Twitch.

sponsors.title: Sponsors
sponsors.subtitle: The brands and partners supporting the channel. Discover their products and enjoy exclusive promo codes.
sponsors.emptySub: Come back soon to discover our partner brands.
